projectDescription: A specialized SaaS platform providing a technical catalog of vehicle cut points, relay configurations, and installation guides for GPS tracking professionals and automotive technicians.
keyFeatures: Hierarchical vehicle catalog browsable by category, brand, model, and year range
Technical cut point data with cable location, color, and relay configuration
Relay configuration diagrams with pin-by-pin details
Step-by-step visual tutorials for vehicle disassembly and cable identification
Real-time search with intelligent brand and model matching
Collaborative data entry with anti-duplication wizard
Community feedback via per-cut likes and problem reports
Role-based access control (RBAC) with Jefe, Supervisor, and Tecnico roles
Admin dashboard with activity logs and inbox for managing reports
Progressive Web App (PWA) with offline support via service worker
Dark mode with persistent preference and dynamic branding
Google Sheets backend via Google Apps Script microservices
publicApiSurface: routeAction(action, payload) — central API router dispatching to Google Apps Script endpoints
getCatalogData — fetch complete catalog (cortes, tutoriales, relay, logos)
getNavigationData — fetch lightweight navigation metadata (categories, brands, logos)
getDropdownData — fetch dropdown options for the data entry form
getSuggestion(term, field) — fuzzy spelling suggestion using Levenshtein distance
checkVehicle(vehicleInfo) — check for existing vehicle matches before adding
addOrUpdateCut(vehicleId, vehicleData, cutData, colaborador) — add or update a cut point
addSupplementaryInfo(vehicleId, apertura, cableAlimen, notaImportante, images) — add supplementary vehicle info
login(username, password) — authenticate user and return session token
validateSession(userId, sessionToken) — validate an existing session
recordLike(vehicleId, corteIndex, userId, userName) — upvote a cut point
reportProblem(vehicleId, problemDescription, userId, userName) — report a data error
sendContactForm(name, email, message, userId) — submit contact/support form
getFeedbackItems() — retrieve all inbox feedback items for admin
replyToFeedback(itemId, itemType, replyText, responderName) — reply to a feedback item
markAsResolved(itemId) — mark a feedback item as resolved
getActivityLogs() — retrieve user activity audit logs
getUsers() — list users (admin only)
createUser(userData) — create a new user account
updateUser(userData) — update an existing user
deleteUser(userId) — delete a user
changePassword(userId, newPassword) — change a user password
updateProfile(userId, profileData) — update current user profile
